feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to publish an on-premise CDS View as a fiori tile?
entry.content:
Hi everyone

I have an on-premise cds report created in eclipse that has already been registered as a service under transaction code /n/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE and I am able to view the cds view as a fiori preview application. I would like to know is there a detailed guide on how to publish an on-premise CDS view as a fiori tile?

entry.title: Is it possible to set the "Key User Rel. State" of a CDS-View to Released?
entry.content: I want to create a custom cds view to create an analysis with embedded Analytics. The problem is that I'm not able to add an existing cds view to "Data Sources" in the fiori app "Custom CDS Views". The reason seems to be the fact that my existing cds view has the "Key User Rel. State" set to not released. Is it possible to change it to "released"?

entry.title: SAP VIM - Invalid DP Data error (WX601 - Enter Valid Parameter) while approving the contract
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

in tcode /opt/vim_wp theres theres an approval button. after 1st attempt of clicking the approval button no error occured but if tried to go back to the previous screen and click the approval button again the error "Invalid DP Data" occured

has anyone experienced this error ? dou you guys have any ideas on what could be the root cause of the issue? this is only happening in Contract Type PO and note that plant is empty in ekpo table because it is part of the company processes (not sure if it is related to the error encountered)

entry.title: Add new empty rows in Oops ALV Custom container
entry.content:
I'm creating alv custom container with oops , client wants 10 empty rows in alv container by default... if any data is there in alv container after display the 10 initial  rows wanted also and if I'll add new record in 1st empty row in container for save purpose add new empty row in custom container ...i want fixed 10 empty rows.. please give example code...it has no data also append 10 empty rows for creating new record..I think you understand my requirement..

(Note : don't create custom icons ,it will work only any action based ) 

Thank you..

entry.title: How to Add a New Segment to Message Type MDM_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA Without an Extension?
entry.content:
I need to add a new segment to the IDoc message type MDM_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA with basic type MDM_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA01. However, this message type does not allow extensions - “Action is not possible for generated IDoc types” (I guess because this is a standard message type and cannot be changed/edited).

This message type is outbound and is triggered when an equipment change occurs in SAP, creating a change pointer that later generates an IDoc.


What I Have Tried

1.Since I cannot use a standard extension, I manually added the segment by modifying the function module ALE_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA, which is responsible for IDoc creation.

2.I created a custom segment in WE31 (ZE1BP_IEQM_GWLEN) and populated it inside ALE_EQUIPMENT_SAVEREPLICA:

 

3.Issue:

•The segment appears correctly inside the generated IDoc with the correct data.

•However, when I modify the equipment data and reprocess the IDoc, I get IDoc status 26 (Syntax Error in IDoc).

•The error only appeared after I made changes to the equipment data, suggesting that the system is validating the IDoc structure and rejecting the new segment.

Questions

1.How can I properly add a new segment to this message type if I cannot use an extension?

2.Is there a way to modify the IDoc structure dynamically to allow this new segment?

3.Should I create a completely new message type for this? If yes, what is the recommended approach?

4.Is there an alternative method to add this field without modifying the existing message type?

 

I appreciate any insights or recommendations on the best way to handle this scenario. 🚀

entry.title: Can we use open source libraries with RAP or CAP ?
entry.content: I want to use an open source library such as moment.js in RAP application , Is it possible ?

entry.title: ABAP Round Trip Time
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I am investigating transaction log from SAP GUI and would like to confirm ABAP "response time" meaning.

My understanding is the below.

E2E Round Trip Time = GUI Time（Front EndProcessing time）+ GUI Net Time（Communication time）+ Response Time（Application Processing Time）

Do you think that my understanding is correct?

Could you tell me  SAP provide any official docs with this?

 

ABAP Connectivity

entry.title: LotMaster custom field data cannot be saved to database
entry.content:
I create a new tab in MSC*N, and extend it in BADI ES_BATCH_MASTER.

refer to sample class CL_EX_VB_BM_ADD_SCREEN_FIELDS, I extend in AFTER_CUSTOM_SCREEN_PAI & BEFORE_CUSTOM_SUBSCREEN_PBO, but can't save addon fields into MCHA.

BEFORE_CUSTOM_SUBSCREEN_PBO：gs_mcha = is_mcha.

AFTER_CUSTOM_SCREEN_PAI：es_mcha = gs_mcha.

I only extend MCHA in system by APPEND.

My question is that does it necessary to extend MCH1 also?

entry.title: Displaying content after the fixed footer main window in a samrtform
entry.content:
Hi,

I am displaying a table in the main window of the smartforms and to display the footer at the fixed bottom position I am using the method mentioned in the thread by creating a folder within the main window say “Check_Footer”.

https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/footer-at-the-bottom-of-the-page-in-smartforms/m-p/7777043

All this is working fine. Now I have a requirement to display a disclaimer as an additional page ( fixed content of 1 page) after the main window. If I give a command to go to the next page in the main window, the footer window will not show.

How do we handle the scenario of displaying the footer only after the table content at the fixed bottom position and an additional page after the content of the main window?

Thanks

entry.title: STO value fetch using BAPI
entry.content:
Dear Guys!!!

I need a BAPI to fetch STO  delivery note value. In STO whenever its received against a document is created where amount is set. I need to fetch these STO value using BAPI.Please guided me

 

Rajib Hossain

entry.title: FIORI Elements: BOPF Action not visible
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am currently trying to implement a FIORI App with BOPF based Backend. However, the BOPF Actions I have created aren't visible in FIORI. Testing them in Transaction BOBX works as expected though

Code for Basic and Projection View:

 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZTH_I_FLIGHTS'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Basic CDS for FIORI BOPF App'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: false

@Search.searchable: true

//BOPF
@ObjectModel: {
    writeActivePersistence: 'zth_sflights',
    semanticKey: [ 'carrid', 'connid', 'fldate' ],
    representativeKey: 'carrid',
    createEnabled: true,
    updateEnabled: false,
    deleteEnabled: false,
    draftEnabled: false,
    modelCategory: #BUSINESS_OBJECT, 
    compositionRoot: true
}
define view ZTH_DEMO_I_FLIGHTS as select from sflight
{
    .defaultSearchElement: true
    key carrid,
    key connid,
    key fldate,
    price,
    currency,
    planetype,
    seatsmax,
    seatsocc,
    paymentsum,
    seatsmax_b,
    seatsocc_b,
    seatsmax_f,
    seatsocc_f
}

 

 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZTH_C_FLIGHTS'
@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true
@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Consumption View for Model'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: false
@Metadata.allowExtensions: true

@Search.searchable: true
@UI.headerInfo.typeName: 'TypeName'
@UI.headerInfo.title.value: 'Title Value'

@OData.publish: true

//BOPF
@ObjectModel: {
    transactionalProcessingEnabled: true,
    writeActivePersistence: 'ZTH_I_FLIGHTS',
    semanticKey: [ 'carrid', 'connid', 'fldate' ],
    representativeKey: 'carrid',
    createEnabled: true,
    updateEnabled: false,
    deleteEnabled: false,
    draftEnabled: false, 
    compositionRoot: true
}
define view ZTH_DEMO_C_FLIGHTS as select from ZTH_DEMO_I_FLIGHTS
{
    .defaultSearchElement: true
    .identification: [{ position: 10, importance: #HIGH }]
    .lineItem: [
    { position: 10, importance: #HIGH },
    { type: #FOR_ACTION, position: 3, dataAction: 'BOPF:TO_TEST', label: 'Test' }
    ,{ type: #FOR_ACTION, position: 4, dataAction: 'BOPF:DO_STATIC', label: 'Static' }
    ]
    key carrid,
    .lineItem: [{ position: 20 }]
    key connid,
    .lineItem: [{ position: 30 }]
    key fldate,
    .lineItem: [{ position: 40 }]
    price,
    .lineItem: [{ position: 50 }]
    currency,
    .lineItem: [{ position: 60 }]
    planetype,
    .lineItem: [{ position: 70 }]
    seatsmax,
    .lineItem: [{ position: 80 }]
    seatsocc,
    .lineItem: [{ position: 90 }]
    paymentsum
//    seatsmax_b,
//    seatsocc_b,
//    seatsmax_f,
//    seatsocc_f
}

 

Definition of Action in BOPF Object:

FIORI App was created in Business Appplication Studio via BAS and FIORI Generator as a List Report Page.

Now whats strange: The Buttons are there, but without any Labels which I have defined in Annotation.

After that I tried to change Description of Column Fields but that doesnt work either:

 

    @ui.lineItem: [{ position: 30 }]
    @EndUserText: {
        label: 'Z_FLDATE',
        quickInfo: 'A Tooltip'
    }
    fldate;

 

Strangely when I hide a Field with UI.hiddenField : true, this works instant in Preview

So what have I done to resolve:

  • Open in private Window and restart with clear cache
  • Refresh metadata of FIORI Project in Service Manager
  • Created Metadata Extension File and moved Annotations

Minimum UI5 Version is 1.108.35 (Source System Version)

Disclaimer: Due to used ABAP Version 7.50 the RAP Approach is not possible.

entry.title: How to create cost center custom fields using bapi
entry.content:
Hi experts,

How to create cost center custom fields using BAPI.

I have tried many ways but couldn't able to identify.could you please help me to resolve.

entry.title: SoapFault:faultstring=Error reading XMLStreamReader: Unexpected character
entry.content:
Hi Expert

I’m facing an issue while working on a SOAP web service call in my ABAP program, and I’m seeking your guidance.

Error Details:

During the execution of the web service, I encounter the following error:

Scenario:

  • Web Service Type: SOAP
  • Proxy Class: Used for calling the service in ABAP.
  • Payload: Sent from the ABAP program using a generated proxy class.

The error seems to suggest that the response or request payload contains invalid characters or is not properly formatted XML. This happens when sending the SOAP request to a CPI endpoint.

What I’ve Checked So Far:

  1. Payload Structure:

    • Ensured the payload has the correct SOAP envelope and namespace definitions.
    • Verified all required fields are populated.

  2. CPI Logs:

    • Checked logs in SAP Integration Suite (CPI) and observed issues during payload processing.

  3. Proxy Configuration:

    • Verified endpoint, authentication, and proxy configurations in the ABAP program.

  4. Request Validation:

    • Used HTTP tools (Postman , soapUI) to send the same payload, and it worked as expected, pointing to an issue in the ABAP-generated payload.

 

Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Taher

entry.title: New search box in Eclipse ADT not working properly
entry.content:
Hi guys,

This week, my Ecipse ABAP Developer Tools were updated and suddenly noticed that we have a new Search Box. Though there's a problem with it. See next:

If I put the cursor inside the search field and press "CTRL + V" my text is not pasted inside the Search field, but in the Code itself

Has anyone faced this with the new search box?

EDIT:

As a workaround, I have disabled the following option to get the old search popup back:

 

 

Regards.

entry.title: what's the difference between edit_mask and convexit in alv Field Catalog?
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm a new abap developer, I use alv to develop reports.

There are two ways to use the Conversion Exit:

1. Use edit_mask

 

edit_mask = '==ALPHA'

 

2. Use convexit

 

convexit = 'ALPHA'

 

What is the difference between the two?

If edit_mask can achieve the function, then isn't convexit redundant?

entry.title: Custom Value Help Creation For a Particular Field In SAP RAP.
entry.content:
This blog is about implementing value help using custom entity.

This is one of the way to implement value help.

Introduction 

 In SAP RAP (Restful ABAP Programming), a custom entity refers to a user-defined data model that represents business data specific to your needs. It’s typically created using Core Data Services (CDS) views and exposed as an OData service for consumption in applications like Fiori.

Custom entities in RAP empower developers to create tailored data models that fit unique business scenarios while easily integrating with SAP's cloud and UI platforms.

The custom entity provides a structure and implements the logic via an ABAP class. The entity itself does not contain any data but must always be called by the SADL framework first. This is why custom entities are mainly used in RAP applications.

In this blog we will make Value help for Status field In our RAP Project.

Final Output :-

 

 

Implementation

In the first step, we begin by creating the Core Data Service and the ABAP class.

1. Class

Since the class in the annotation is also checked when the custom entity is created, we implement the empty class first.

To do this, we create the class and use the interface IF_RAP_QUERY_PROVIDER, which expects the custom entity.

 

 

 

CLASS zcl_status_query DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    INTERFACES if_rap_query_provider .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.


CLASS zcl_status_query IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD if_rap_query_provider~select.
* write logic here


  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

 

2. Core Data Service

In the next step, we create the Core Data Service using the context menu. We use the CDS template "defineCustomEntityWithParameters" as a template:-

 

 

 Now Add This annotation at CDS

 

 

@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_STATUS_QUERY'

 

 

Now We will create two fields:

  • First we create a status field with appropriate data type. In this we will enter the description of the status field.
  •  The next field is the short description of the status. ( ex: N   = New ).

Since we are using built-in data types, we also set the label and tooltip for the user so that the texts appear in the UI.

 

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Value Help cds for status data element'
@ObjectModel.query.implementedBy: 'ABAP:ZCL_STATUS_QUERY'
define custom entity ZCDi_status_VH
{
    @EndUserText.label: 'Status'
    @EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Currently available status'
    key status : abap.char(10);
    
    @EndUserText.label: 'Status(Short)'
    @EndUserText.quickInfo: 'Short Name for the status'
    Status_short : abap.char(1);
     
}

 

 

We have now created the basic elements that we need for the search help. In this section we implement the necessary logic to see data in the UI.

 To do this, we bind the search help to the field in the projection view.

 

 

   @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: 'ZCDI_STATUS_VH', element: 'status' } }]
      Status,

 

 

Since value help must also be released externally, you should include the view in your service definition.

(NOTE: Expose only if you did association with the custom CDS. In this case we will do ) .

 

 

@EndUserText.label: 'Employee table service defination'
define service Zsd_empheader {
  expose zcdp_Empheader;
  expose zcdp_address;
  expose zcdp_items;
  expose ZCDi_status_VH;
}

 

 

3. Extending the previously defined class

Let's now extend the query class with the logic we need to be able to use the value help easily. To do this, we need an internal table with the data type of the custom entity. We fill this with the appropriate data

 

 

    DATA: lt_create TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF  zcdi_status_vh WITH EMPTY KEY.

    lt_create = VALUE #( ( status = 'New'         Status_short = 'N' )
                          ( status = 'Completed'  Status_short = 'C' )
                           ( status = 'Invalid'   Status_short = 'I' )
                            ( status = 'Pending'  Status_short = 'P' )
     ).


    IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).
      io_response->set_data( lt_create ).
    ENDIF.

    IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_create ) ).
    ENDIF.

    io_request->get_sort_elements( ).
    io_request->get_paging( ).

 

To return the data, we still have to call the appropriate REPSONSE methods. Here it is important to only call the methods if the framework requests it, otherwise an error will occur. Therefore, we first ask whether the fields have been requested and then call the method. It is also important that the two methods must always be implemented and should not, for example, be in a TRY/CATCH, where they may not be called if an error occurs.

 

    IF io_request->is_data_requested( ).
      io_response->set_data( lt_create ).
    ENDIF.

    IF io_request->is_total_numb_of_rec_requested( ).
      io_response->set_total_number_of_records( lines( lt_create ) ).
    ENDIF.

 

 

In addition to this method, we also must call the GET_PAGING method, for which we receive a similar error. The call to the methods must be implemented within the method call.

 

 

    io_request->get_sort_elements( ).
    io_request->get_paging( ).

 

 

Now  we have to associate our custom cds with the root cds where status field is present and expose the custom status entity.

 

 

association  to ZCDi_status_VH   as _status       on  $projection.Status = _status.status.

*expose it
_status,

 

 

  • status -> Field in the custom entity.
  • Status -> field in the root CDS.
  •  

Result :-

 

On Clicking value help , value help window will appear.

 

On clicking to the required status, it will populate In the field.

entry.title: Enhancement to Update NAST in VA02
entry.content:
Hi All,
I have an output type that is triggered when a custom Z field is updated. This Z field gets updated through a BAPI during the creation of a Post Goods Receipt (PGR) in an STO process. The output sends an email with PO details, which are populated from the updated Z field.

I initially tried using Memory ID to pass the value, but I encountered an issue. When two PGRs are created within a few seconds, the first output picks up the PO value of the second PGR due to the shared nature of Memory IDs. To avoid this, I thought of updating unused fields in the output type instead.

I need an enhancement (user exit or BAdI) to update the output type during the save process in VA02. Could anyone guide me on the best approach or enhancement point to achieve this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: currency_conversion() function is showing error for cds view entity.
entry.content:
I've created a cds view entity( define view entity <view_name>) with some elements and added currency_conversion() function to convert currency from 'USD' to 'EUR' it is showing error as-
ZD_TRAVEL_2-AUDCURR reference information missing or data type wrong, see long text ZD_TRAVEL_2 

-------- Same code is not showing error for cds view i.e., define view <view_name>

entry.title: Resulttype of "IS_EE_ORG_ASS_REPL_REQ-ORG_ASSIGNMENT[... ]" cannot be converted into the type of
entry.content:
Hello.

I have the following issue :

My requirement is define a TYPES with the following structure and a field additional , and then create a internal table of this type. called lt_fin

TYPES : BEGIN OF gty_displaydata_order,
    INCLUDE TYPE SFIOM_S_REPL_REQ_ORG_ASS_EXTND,
    persg       TYPE persg.
TYPES END OF gty_displaydata_order.

DATA :lt_fin  TYPE TABLE OF gty_displaydata_order .
IF lv_cont >= 2.
  APPEND LINES OF is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment[ lv_cont - 1 ] TO lt_fin .
ELSEIF lv_cont = 1.
  APPEND is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment[ lv_cont ] TO lt_fin.
ENDIF.

Initially I have a internal table is_ee_org_ass_repl_req-org_assignment that receive as parameter with information information and I nee add to the table lt_fin only the two last record .

I need complete the information of the field persg that query of the table HRP1013 in the table lt_fin for each position that have in the field employee_class = 9.

however when want pass the two last record the system generate  the following error:

Result type of "IS_EE_ORG_ASS_REPL_REQ-ORG_ASSIGNMENT[... ]" cannot be converted into the type of
"LT_FIN".

I share the following information

entry.title: Any possible side effects to using TOUCHSRC?
entry.content:
Hi all,

Recently we had some dumps with LOAD_PROGRAM_TABLE_MISMATCH related to a column added to a standard table. There are some SAP Notes related to this and one of the recommendations is running the program TOUCHSRC for fixing the program that gave out the error.

My question: Is there any possible problem or side effect using this program (TOUCHSRC)? My main concern is that this would be executed in a production system.

TIA,

Luis
